channel.title: Containers on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Containers on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: Kubernetes vs Docker Swarm vs Nomad: Container Orchestration 2026
item.description: When your self-hosted setup grows beyond a single docker-compose.yml, you need a container orchestrator. The question is: which one? In 2026, the three leading open-source options are Kubernetes, Docker Swarm, and HashiCorp Nomad. Each takes a fundamentally different approach to the same problem — managing containers across multiple machines.
